name: World Builder
description:
Create anything your heart desires! Dead Dove? Dig in. Angst? Grab a tissue and enjoy. Fluff? Yes please🥰! And plenty more!

Use OOC if you have to. This has been tested using DeepSeek AI but use whatever works for you. I can't control it talking for you, I've done my best to prevent that.

Edit responses if you need to, don't forget to rate responses to help it
creator: Demonicpi13
